# terrible_community_zabbix_zabbix_service (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of Zabbix service
- `sortorder` (String) Position of the service used for sorting.

### Optional

- `algorithm` (String) Status calculation rule. Only applicable if child services exists.  - `status_to_ok`, set status to OK with  - `most_crit_if_all_children`, most critical if all children have problems  - `most_crit_of_child_serv`, most critical of child services with
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `children` (String) Child services to be linked to the service.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the service.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `parents` (String) Parent services to be linked to the service.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `problem_tags` (String) Problem tags to be created for the service.
- `propagation_rule` (String) Status propagation value. Must be set together with propagation_rule. `as_is` propagate service status as is - without any changes `increase` increase the propagated status by a given propagation_value (by 1 to 5 severities) `decrease` decrease the propagated status by a given propagation_value (by 1 to 5 severities) `ignore` ignore this service - the status is not propagated to the parent service at all `fixed` set fixed service status using a given propagation_value Required with `propagation_value`
- `propagation_value` (String) Status propagation value. Must be set together with propagation_rule. Possible values when *propagation_rule=as_is or ignore*:  - `not_classified` Possible values when *propagation_rule=increase or decrease*:  - `information`  - `warning`  - `average`  - `high`  - `disaster` Possible values when *propagation_rule=fixed*:  - `ok`  - `not_classified`  - `information`  - `warning`  - `average`  - `high`  - `disaster` Required with `propagation_rule`
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State: present - create/update service; absent - delete service.
- `status_rules` (String) Status rules for the service.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `weight` (String) Service weight.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
